falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by 3% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal, indicating a confirmed trend reversal against the current uncertainty.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to 150% of the 14-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate a major shift in market sentiment, contradicting the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by confirming a directional move.

falsification_conditions.condition: The price drops below the 2024 August bottom level by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant breakdown below the historical bottom pattern would falsify the current 'HOLD' by confirming a bearish continuation rather than a reversal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
